title: centratherum courtallense
intro: Centratherum courtallense is a plant species native to the Western Ghats region of India, belonging to the family Compositae and commonly known as Courtallum Centratherum or Indian Wormseed. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. Its health benefits are attributed to its ability to treat digestive problems, skin infections, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional Indian medicine, Centratherum courtallense is prepared into herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and powders, which are used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
